root_text.sn40.6:1.4: ‘idha bhikkhu sabbaso ākāsānañcāyatanaṁ samatikkamma anantaṁ viññāṇanti viññāṇañcāyatanaṁ upasampajja viharati.
root_text.sn40.6:1.6: So khvāhaṁ, āvuso, sabbaso ākāsānañcāyatanaṁ samatikkamma anantaṁ viññāṇanti viññāṇañcāyatanaṁ upasampajja viharāmi.
root_text.sn40.6:1.7: Tassa mayhaṁ, āvuso, iminā vihārena viharato ākāsānañcāyatanasahagatā saññāmanasikārā samudācaranti.
root_text.sn40.6:2.1: Atha kho maṁ, āvuso, bhagavā iddhiyā upasaṅkamitvā etadavoca:
root_text.sn40.6:2.3: Mā, brāhmaṇa, viññāṇañcāyatanaṁ pamādo, viññāṇañcāyatane cittaṁ saṇṭhapehi, viññāṇañcāyatane cittaṁ ekodiṁ karohi, viññāṇañcāyatane cittaṁ samādahā’ti.
root_text.sn40.6:2.4: So khvāhaṁ, āvuso, aparena samayena sabbaso ākāsānañcāyatanaṁ samatikkamma anantaṁ viññāṇanti viññāṇañcāyatanaṁ upasampajja vihāsiṁ.
root_text.sn40.6:2.5: Yañhi taṁ, āvuso, sammā vadamāno vadeyya …pe… mahābhiññataṁ patto”ti.

translation_text.sn40.6:0.3: A Question About the Dimension of Infinite Consciousness
translation_text.sn40.6:1.1: “They speak of this thing called the ‘dimension of infinite consciousness’.
translation_text.sn40.6:1.2: What is the dimension of infinite consciousness?
translation_text.sn40.6:1.4: ‘It’s when a mendicant, going totally beyond the dimension of infinite space, aware that “consciousness is infinite”, enters and remains in the dimension of infinite consciousness.
translation_text.sn40.6:1.5: This is called the dimension of infinite consciousness.’
translation_text.sn40.6:1.6: And so … I was entering and remaining in the dimension of infinite consciousness.
translation_text.sn40.6:1.7: While I was in that meditation, perception and focus accompanied by the dimension of infinite space beset me.
translation_text.sn40.6:2.1: Then the Buddha came up to me with his psychic power and said,
translation_text.sn40.6:2.3: Don’t neglect the dimension of infinite consciousness, brahmin! Settle your mind in the dimension of infinite consciousness; unify your mind and immerse it in the dimension of infinite consciousness.’
translation_text.sn40.6:2.4: And so, after some time … I entered and remained in the dimension of infinite consciousness.
translation_text.sn40.6:2.5: So if anyone should be rightly called a disciple who attained to great direct knowledge with help from the Teacher, it’s me.”
